## Q2 2026

### Core Features (To Be Updated)

This section needs to be updated with three new feature plans, including projected release dates for each feature.
arguments.newText:
## Q2 2026

### Core Features (Planned)

### Real-Time Collaboration v1
- Live presence (who’s viewing/editing)
- Optimistic concurrency + conflict resolution for task/title/description edits
- WebSocket/SSE channel via API Gateway with Redis-backed fanout
- Audit events emitted for edits (used by activity feed)
- **Projected**: 2026-05-06

### Notifications & Subscriptions
- User-level notification preferences (per project + per event type)
- Event-driven notification pipeline (outbox pattern) for task changes, mentions, assignments
- Delivery adapters: in-app + email (extensible for Slack later)
- Rate limiting + digest aggregation to reduce noise
- **Projected**: 2026-05-20

### Activity Feed & Change History
- Unified activity stream per project (tasks, comments, status changes)
- Backfill from audit events + incremental ingest
- Cursor-based pagination + filtering (actor, entity type, date range)
- Data retention policy + partitioning strategy for scale
- **Projected**: 2026-06-03

content.text:
# Project Roadmap — Orion Platform

## Q1 2026 (Completed)

### Authentication System v2.0
- OAuth 2.0 integration completed
- Multi-factor authentication deployed
- Session management improvements
- **Status**: Released on 2026-03-15

### API Gateway Upgrade
- Rate limiting with Redis backend
- Request validation layer
- Enhanced monitoring and alerting
- **Status**: Released on 2026-03-28

## Q2 2026

### Core Features (Planned)

### Real-Time Collaboration v1
- Live presence (who’s viewing/editing)
- Optimistic concurrency + conflict resolution for task/title/description edits
- WebSocket/SSE channel via API Gateway with Redis-backed fanout
- Audit events emitted for edits (used by activity feed)
- **Projected**: 2026-05-06

### Notifications & Subscriptions
- User-level notification preferences (per project + per event type)
- Event-driven notification pipeline (outbox pattern) for task changes, mentions, assignments
- Delivery adapters: in-app + email (extensible for Slack later)
- Rate limiting + digest aggregation to reduce noise
- **Projected**: 2026-05-20

### Activity Feed & Change History
- Unified activity stream per project (tasks, comments, status changes)
- Backfill from audit events + incremental ingest
- Cursor-based pagination + filtering (actor, entity type, date range)
- Data retention policy + partitioning strategy for scale
- **Projected**: 2026-06-03

## Q3 2026 (Planned)

### Mobile SDK v1.0
- iOS and Android native SDKs
- Real-time sync capabilities
- Offline mode support
- **Projected**: 2026-07-15

### Advanced Analytics Dashboard
- Custom reporting engine
- Data export capabilities
- Role-based access control
- **Projected**: 2026-08-30

## Q4 2026 (Under Review)

Feature planning for Q4 is currently under review with the product team. Details to be finalized by end of Q2.
